results.serviceName: Get latest market quote data for one or more cryptocurrencies including price, volume, market cap, and percent changes.

resource.description: cmc crypto quote latest data api

id.description: One or more comma-separated CoinMarketCap cryptocurrency IDs. Example: "1,1027".

slug.description: One or more comma-separated cryptocurrency slugs. Example: "bitcoin,ethereum".

symbol.description: One or more comma-separated cryptocurrency symbols. Example: "BTC,ETH".

convert.description: Optionally calculate market quotes in up to 120 currencies by passing a comma-separated list. Default: "USD".

convert_id.description: Optionally calculate market quotes by CoinMarketCap ID instead of symbol.

aux.description: Comma-separated list of supplemental data fields: num_market_pairs, cmc_rank, date_added, tags, platform, max_supply, circulating_supply, total_supply, is_active, is_fiat.

skip_invalid.description: Pass true to relax request validation and skip any invalid IDs/symbols.

results.serviceName: Get a paginated list of all active cryptocurrencies with latest market data including price, market cap, and volume.

parsedChallenge.error: Path not configured for x402 payment

results.serviceName: Search DEX data by token name, symbol, or contract address across supported networks.

q.description: Search keyword. Matches token name, symbol, or contract address.

results.serviceName: Get latest market quotes for DEX spot pairs. Query by contract address and network to get real-time pricing data for decentralized exchange trading pairs.

pair_address.description: The contract address of the DEX pair to query. One or more comma-separated pair addresses.

network_id.description: The network ID of the blockchain where the pair exists. E.g., "1" for Ethereum, "56" for BSC, "8453" for Base.

convert.description: Optionally calculate market quotes in a given fiat or cryptocurrency. Default: "USD".

convert_id.description: Optionally calculate market quotes by CoinMarketCap ID instead of symbol.

skip_invalid.description: Pass true to relax request validation and skip any invalid pair addresses.

results.serviceName: Generate an image using Gemini.
Trigger a card data refresh (re-scrape balance and transactions from issuer). Rate limited to once per card every 5 minutes.
Withdraw from account balance to connected wallet. Minimum $0.01.
Refresh an expired id_token using a refresh_token. Returns a new id_token and user_id.
Query withdrawal processing status. Returns tx_hash once processed.
Search whether a US merchant accepts the Laso prepaid debit card. Recommended before ordering a card to avoid surprises — prepaid debit cards are not accepted everywhere.
REQUIRED FIRST STEP: Get authentication credentials (id_token, refresh_token, user_id) before calling any other Laso endpoint. The id_token is a Bearer token valid for ~1 hour.

Order a prepaid card (US only, USD). PREREQUISITE: Call /auth first to get an id_token. WARNING: Prepaid debit cards are NOT accepted everywhere. Before ordering, ask the user what they want to buy and recommend checking /search-merchants first. Make sure the user understands this is a prepaid debit card and not all merchants accept them. The x402 payment equals the card amount ($5–$1000). Returns a card_id with status 'pending' — poll /get-card-data for card details.
Retrieve card status and details (number, expiry, CVV, balance, transactions). Omit card_id to list all cards.
Retrieve account balance, total deposits, and creation timestamp.
Buy a ticket for the next drawing.
Get DEX trade data for tokens or wallets.

token_a_amount.title: Token A Amount
token_a_amount.description: Token A amount in human-readable units, e.g. 1.5 for 1.5 SOL

token_b_amount.title: Token B Amount
token_b_amount.description: Token B amount in human-readable units, e.g. 100 for 100 USDC

token_a_amount.title: Token A Amount
token_a_amount.description: Token A amount in base units

token_b_amount.title: Token B Amount

position_mint.title: Position Mint

results.serviceName: Fetch liquidity position state by NFT mint address including price bounds, token amounts, and accrued fees.

Scan any token contract across 60+ blockchains for security risks — honeypots, tax analysis, ownership status, scam patterns, and more.

resource.description: Quick Intel smart contract security audit API covering 60+ blockchains. Returns comprehensive token analysis including: honeypot detection, buy/sell/transfer tax analysis, contract ownership and renouncement status, mint/burn/blacklist/pause capabilities, proxy detection, fee modification risks, LP lock status, liquidity analysis, suspicious and external function detection, scam pattern matching, known scam wallet funding checks, insider trading risk assessment, fund theft vulnerability analysis, and contract verification status. Powered by Quick Intel's proprietary fingerprinting system.

chain.description: Blockchain network name (e.g., "eth", "bsc", "base", "sol"). See docs for all 63 supported chains.

tokenAddress.description: Token contract address to scan. EVM: 0x-prefixed hex. Solana: base58.

tokenDetails.description: Token name, symbol, decimals, supply, creation date

tokenDynamicDetails.description: Honeypot status, buy/sell/transfer tax, trading cooldown, liquidity

quickiAudit.description: Ownership, proxy, mint/blacklist/pause capabilities, suspicious functions, scam patterns

parsedChallenge.message: This endpoint requires $0.03 USDC to access. See accepts array for supported networks.

results.serviceName: JSON-RPC gateway for 79+ blockchain networks.
